name: Workspace
initializeCommand:
touch .env && grep -q '^COMPOSE_PROFILES=' .env || printf '
COMPOSE_PROFILES=dev,bundled
JWT_SECRET=dev-placeholder
LETTA_SERVER_PASS=dev-placeholder
OPENAI_API_KEY=dev-placeholder
' >> .env
postStartCommand: JWT_SECRET=dev-placeholder LETTA_SERVER_PASS=dev-placeholder OPENAI_API_KEY=dev-placeholder docker compose --profile bundled up -d bear-postgres bears-memfs-manager bears-den bears-pool
